response:
a novice rider, alex, is relying on an expert cyclist, jame, to help select the most suitable bike components and accessories for a long-distance cycling event. jame suggests considering a combination of a lightweight frame, high-efficiency gears, and aerodynamic accessories to optimize performance.  

the frame of the bike has a base weight of w kilograms. each advanced component added to the frame reduces the weight by 2%. if alex adds n advanced components, the final weight of the frame, w_f, is expressed as w - 0.02 * n.  

the minimum number of advanced components, n, alex should add to the bike to meet the desired energy expenditure reduction is 10. clock is used to measure the time taken for the event, and clock is used to track the progress of the riders. clock is used to ensure that the energy expenditure reduction is achieved within the desired timeframe.
